title: Launch founding engineer hiring pipeline
description: Execute the sourcing plan in docs/hiring-plan.md: publish the job posting, send 10 network intros, and open the interview pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Job posting live on at least one channel
10 targeted intro messages sent with tracking in docs/hiring/pipeline-tracker.md
Interview stages configured with calendar links
Work sample brief shared with pipeline doc link

title: Bootstrap dev environment for new engineers
description: New engineers clone the repo and reach a running app in under 15 minutes.
acceptanceCriteria: Fresh clone verified on a clean machine or container

title: Add CI pipeline for pull requests
description: Every PR to master runs automated checks before merge.
acceptanceCriteria: GitHub Actions workflow on pull_request and push to master
Branch protection requires passing CI before merge

title: Write product spec v0
description: One-page product spec: problem, target user, MVP scope, and explicit non-goals.
acceptanceCriteria: Sections: Problem, User, MVP scope, Non-goals, Success metrics
CEO sign-off recorded in issue comment
